Registered as a DISTINCT composition bucket so that verbatim quotations of the base text surface as commentary→base edges in compute_quotation_network (folding into the base would self-loop and vanish). Base composition id: therapeutic.

print_editions.citation: Frahm, E. 2011. Babylonian and Assyrian Text Commentaries. GMTR 5.
print_editions.title: Babylonian and Assyrian Text Commentaries
print_editions.series: Guides to the Mesopotamian Textual Record 5

compositions.name: Iqqur īpuš
compositions.description: Base composition Iqqur īpuš, registered (auxiliary, off compositions-v1.json) so ccpo commentary→base edges can resolve their base endpoint. Witnesses are seeded ONLY where a verbatim length-20 chunk co-occurs with a ccpo commentary AND the eBL editorial genre confirms the family.
